title: Rzeszów、Subcarpathian — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]

概要

RzeszówはSubcarpathianにある人口196,208の都市です。A rapidly growing city in southeastern Poland, emerging as a major IT and aviation hub with a charming old town and a dynamic economy.
